title: Enhancedly Optimized
description: A highly customizable Modpack with a variety of Resource Packs, Shaders and mods to optimize Minecraft and fit it to your liking.
body:
This Modpack makes Minecraft run a whole lot faster and smoother with the help of different performane mods, but aren't so many other Modpacks that do this? Yes, theres a whole lot of other Modpacks that improve Minecrafts Performance. **But this one doesn't just do that**, this Modpack brings a lot of resource Packs and shaders with it so you can customize it to your own liking and also fixes some things.

# ➕ Features ➕



🔥 **Performance boost** 🔥

With Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, C2ME and Entity Culling, your game runs lightning fast.
And with Dash Loader and lazy DFU, your game boots up much faster.

🌺 **Visual Enhancments** 🌺

Mods like Apple Skin, Falling Leaves, Blur, Continuity, and LamdDynamicLights make your         
game look way better. And with Iris, you now have shader support.

🎛️ **Great Customizability** 🎛️

With a lot of shaders and Resource Packs, you have many options to customize your game.

-----

Featured Resource packs that are not available on Modrinth:

[HYCAR](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hycar)

[Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

[xali's Enhanced Biomes: River & Pond](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enhanced-biomes-river-pond)
